# diff

Show what changed on an issue (changelog as structured JSON)

Fetches the changelog for an issue and outputs field-level changes as structured JSON.

Filter by time range (--since) or specific field name (--field).
Supports --jq and --preset for output shaping.

Examples:
  jr diff --issue PROJ-123
  jr diff --issue PROJ-123 --since 2h
  jr diff --issue PROJ-123 --since 2025-01-01
  jr diff --issue PROJ-123 --field status

<span class="method-badge method-get">GET</span> <code class="api-path">/rest/api/3/issue/{issueIdOrKey}/changelog</code>


| Flag | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| `--field` | string | No | filter to a specific field name |
| `--issue` | string | Yes | issue key (e.g. PROJ-123) |
| `--since` | string | No | filter changes since duration (e.g. 2h, 1d) or ISO date (e.g. 2025-01-01) |


**Example:**
```bash
jr diff --issue <issue>
```
